query: Run a WCAG 2.2 Level AA accessibility audit on https://shop.retailbrand.com and generate a scored report with prioritized remediation plan
We're launching our public-facing SaaS app next month and need an accessibility compliance check. Audit the signup flow, dashboard, and settings pages for WCAG 2.2 AA
Our legal team says we need ADA compliance before going live. Can you check our site for accessibility issues and tell us what needs to be fixed with effort estimates?
Run axe-core and Lighthouse accessibility scans on localhost:3000 and then do manual keyboard navigation testing on the checkout form to find focus trap issues
A user with a screen reader reported they can't complete the registration form. Audit the form for missing labels, ARIA attributes, and error announcement issues
Check if our color palette meets WCAG 2.2 contrast requirements — we use #6B7280 text on #F9FAFB background and I suspect it fails the 4.5:1 ratio for normal text
Audit our data table component for accessibility — does it have proper th scope, caption, keyboard navigation for sorting, and screen reader announcements for updates?
We need a Section 508 compliance assessment for our government client. Run the full WCAG 2.2 audit methodology with all 5 phases and generate the formal report template
Our Lighthouse accessibility score is 100 but a blind user told us the site is unusable. What manual tests should we run that automated tools miss, and audit the main user flows?
Check our modal dialog for WCAG 2.2 focus management — specifically 2.4.11 Focus Not Obscured and 2.4.3 Focus Order. The sticky header might be covering the focused element
Fix the color contrast on our primary button — change the background from #3B82F6 to a darker shade that passes WCAG AA 4.5:1 with white text
Add aria-label, aria-expanded, and aria-controls to our hamburger menu button for screen reader support
Implement a skip-to-content link at the top of our page that appears on focus and jumps to the main content area
Our images are missing alt text. Add descriptive alt attributes to all product images in src/components/product-card.tsx
Add keyboard event handlers to our custom dropdown menu so users can navigate with arrow keys, select with Enter, and close with Escape
Run a full SEO audit on our homepage and check meta tags, heading hierarchy, robots.txt, sitemap, and structured data
Check our Core Web Vitals — LCP is slow because the hero image is unoptimized and CLS is caused by font loading
Build a responsive layout that works on mobile, tablet, and desktop with proper breakpoints and flexible grid columns
Set up ESLint with the jsx-a11y plugin to catch accessibility issues automatically during development
Add prefers-reduced-motion media query to disable our CSS animations for users who have motion sensitivity settings enabled
